attacking_style: Attacks on climbs with sufficient strength to drop breakaway companions and sustain solo efforts. Shows willingness to commit early from breakaways rather than waiting for finale.
team_tactics: UAE Team Emirates commits multiple riders to breakaways, coordinating efforts for specific objectives like KOM points. Team willing to invest domestiques in long-range moves.
terrain_preference: Climbing terrain where he can use strength differential to shed companions. Suited to hilly one-day race profiles and stage race breakaway opportunities with categorized climbs.
vulnerability: Limited observations prevent identifying clear weaknesses. Early-season racing suggests potential vulnerability in peak WorldTour competition without more data.
key_patterns: UAE deploys multi-rider breakaway tactics with Van Hecke as key component (2 instances)
Shows climbing strength sufficient to attack and drop breakaway companions on ascents (2 instances)
Early-season form indicator with breakaway-focused racing approach in February period (2 instances)
form_trajectory: positive: demonstrated climbing strength translating from GP de Denain into Tour of Oman, capable of solo attacks from breaks
